The '''gaping spider''' was an [[Spider/Legends|arachnid]] creature native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].

==Biology and appearance==
They were large creatures that inhabited the many caves and warrens on their home world. It was known that the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]] known as the [[Spiderclan/Legends|Spiderclan]] took control over one particular cavern and forced the young spiders to serve them. Only the larger adults managed to resist their will and resulted in the Spiderclan to fear those adults that lived deep underground. Different castes included broodling, hunter, recluse, and queen.

The [[Bane Back spider]] was a larger, stronger and more resistant mutated variant of gaping spider.<ref name="SWG:TTE" />

==History==
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Maldien]] conducted illegal and highly dangerous [[bioengineering]] experiments in a [[Illegal Lab (Corellia)|laboratory]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to create very aggressive and intelligent creatures. This included engineered gaping spiders.<ref name="SWG:CMCOtZ">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Coronet Murmurs: Clear Out the Zoo|Corellia}}</ref>

Around the same time, the collector [[Kakirk]] tasked a group of spacers to hunt and kill an unreasonable number of gaping spiders.<ref name="SWG:GSS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Gaping Spider Slayer}}</ref>
